Ice_Log: 0552: Several radar contacts on ice-bergs, on ranges up to 12 miles.
0628: Radar contact bearing 005T range 6000 yards, determined to be an ice-berg.

0715: Sighted ice-field consisting of heavy growlers, dead ahead and on either bow. Field defined as a tongue from one to three miles wide, extending several miles in a north-east and southwest direction. 0720: Entered ice-field, changed to various courses and speeds. Convoy and other escorts in line-astern, moving through ice-field.
8AM to Noon: At first of watch passed through considerable storis ice; later through scattered icebergs and growlers.
